peer_exemplars.reasoning: Despite high conscientiousness and authoritarianism aligning with transparency, very low openness and internal political efficacy cause only a trivial erosion of 6 points under a diffuse push notification / identity recovery attack that doesn't directly target algorithm plumbing.

Her very high agreeableness and trust make her somewhat receptive to trending narratives that frame transparency mandates as bureaucratic overreach, but her strong libertarian anti-censorship orientation and high conscientiousness limit movement to a small update.
